# Slide-by-slide Canva brief

**Deck.** 28 slides. 16:9. 1920×1080.
**Canvas.** Off-white `#f7f7f8` body, near-black `#0a0a0a` ink, red `#e90d41` accent.
**Type.** Rethink Sans Bold for hero (96–140pt). Rethink Sans Semibold for slide titles (64–84pt). Inter Regular for body (32–40pt).
**Margins.** 96px outer margin on all four sides.
**Imagery.** No stock. No icons. Founder portraits only, moody, near-black backdrop, desaturated. Subtle 1% grid texture on canvas.
**Banned in copy.** `10x` (unless quoting product name), `growth hack`, `guru`, `unlock`, `leverage`, `hustle`, `synergy`, `disrupt`, `game-changer`, `secret sauce`, `follow for more`. No emojis. No em dashes. No hashtags.
**Footer.** Bottom-left every slide except cover: `danielpaul.ai` in Inter 20pt silver `#b8bec1`. Bottom-right: slide number / total in same style.

---

## Slide 1 — Title

- **Layout.** Inverse canvas. Near-black full-bleed.
- **Hero text** (centered, Rethink Sans Bold, 140pt, off-white): "How to build a brand that brings high-ticket buyers to you."
- **Subtitle** (centered, Rethink Sans Semibold 36pt, silver): "Without becoming louder. Without becoming someone you're not."
- **Speaker line** (bottom-left, Inter 24pt, off-white at 70%): "Daniel Paul · 60 minutes · today"
- **Accent.** Single red dot 16px diameter, top-right corner, 96px from edges.

## Slide 2 — The question

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Big-question slide.
- **Hero text** (left-aligned, Rethink Sans Bold, 120pt, near-black):
  "Why do some people charge **$20,000** for the same hour someone else charges $200?"
- **Highlight.** `$20,000` in red `#e90d41`.
- **No subtitle. No image. White space on the right two-thirds.**

## Slide 3 — The frame

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Two-line statement, large.
- **Hero text** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Today is not about getting more clients."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, red): "Today is about being the person they were already looking for."

## Slide 4 — Where I started

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Hero text left, founder portrait right (40%/60% split).
- **Hero text** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Broke. No team. No list. No credibility."
- **Image direction.** Daniel's portrait, headshot crop, moody, desaturated. Use `GBI-Singapore-2026/danny-nobg.png` or `danny.png`. Place on near-black background panel.
- **Caption under image** (Inter 20pt silver): "2020. Charging $300 to build websites."

## Slide 5 — The crossover moment

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Centered statement.
- **Hero text** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "I stopped chasing clients."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, red): "I started building a brand."

## Slide 6 — The names

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Three-name list. Editorial type.
- **Eyebrow** (Rethink Sans Bold, 24pt, uppercase, tracking 0.04em, red): "SAME STAGE. SAME GREEN ROOM."
- **Name 1** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Robert Kiyosaki"
- **Name 2** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Mac Attram"
- **Name 3** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Sandy Jadeja"
- **Caption bottom** (Inter 28pt silver): "18 months later."
- **Anchor stat** (Rethink Sans Bold, 40pt, red, bottom-right corner): "2020: broke. 2026: $250,000 from a stage."

## Slide 7 — What I sold

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Big quote feel.
- **Hero text** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "I didn't have a better offer."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, red): "I had a better brand."

## Slide 8 — The lesson

- **Layout.** Near-black inverse canvas. Single line, massive.
- **Hero text** (Rethink Sans Bold, 140pt, off-white, centered): "The brand walks in the room before you do."
- **Treatment.** Letter-spacing -0.02em. This is the signature line of the talk.

## Slide 9 — What just happened

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Stat slide.
- **Eyebrow** (Rethink Sans Bold, 24pt, uppercase, tracking 0.04em, silver): "AI · 2024 → 2026"
- **Hero stat** (Rethink Sans Bold, 200pt, red): "$50,000/yr → $20/mo"
- **Caption** (Inter 36pt near-black): "The price of a skill, today."

## Slide 10 — The bundling

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Three-column stack.
- **Title** (top-left, Rethink Sans Semibold, 72pt, near-black): "Skills are being bundled."
- **Three blocks** (Inter 32pt near-black, each in a card with 2px near-black border, 0 radius):
  - "Copywriting + research + design + editing + coding"
  - "One Claude agent does the work of five juniors."
  - "Your competitor across the world has the same tools you do. For the same price. Today."

## Slide 11 — The collapse

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Three-line gut punch.
- **Line 1** (Rethink Sans Bold, 84pt, near-black): "Anyone can copy your tone."
- **Line 2** (Rethink Sans Bold, 84pt, near-black): "Anyone can copy your offer."
- **Line 3** (Rethink Sans Bold, 84pt, red): "Anyone can copy your funnel."

## Slide 12 — The one thing left

- **Layout.** Near-black inverse canvas. Big.
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 140pt, off-white, centered):
  "Trust is the most **expensive** asset of 2026."
- **Highlight** "expensive" in red.

## Slide 13 — Framework header

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Big numbers.
- **Eyebrow** (Rethink Sans Bold, 24pt, uppercase, tracking 0.04em, red): "THE FRAMEWORK"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 240pt, near-black): "1 · 1 · 1 · 1"
- **Caption** (Inter 32pt silver): "One platform. One year. One audience. One call to action."

## Slide 14 — One platform

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Single rule.
- **Eyebrow** (red, uppercase): "RULE 1 / 4"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 120pt, near-black): "Pick one platform."
- **Sub** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, red): "Stay for one year."

## Slide 15 — Why one platform wins

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Comparison.
- **Hero top** (Rethink Sans Bold, 80pt, silver): "100,000 wrong followers."
- **Divider** (2px near-black line, full width).
- **Hero bottom** (Rethink Sans Bold, 120pt, near-black): "1,000 right ones."
- **Footer caption** (Inter 28pt near-black): "1,000 right people will pay you more than 100,000 wrong ones."

## Slide 16 — One year

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Big.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "RULE 2 / 4"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "You don't have a content problem."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, red): "You have a quitting problem."

## Slide 17 — The compound math

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Timeline, three blocks.
- **Title** (top, Rethink Sans Semibold 64pt, near-black): "The honest timeline."
- **Three rows** (Inter 36pt body, each row separated by 1px silver hairline):
  - "**Months 1 – 3** — Invisible." (bold "Months 1 – 3" in near-black, rest in silver)
  - "**Months 4 – 9** — The algorithm finds you." (same treatment)
  - "**Month 10 onward** — Inbound starts." (highlight in red)

## Slide 18 — One target audience

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "RULE 3 / 4"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "Stop being useful to everyone."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, red): "Be unforgettable to one."

## Slide 19 — The mirror test

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Quote feel.
- **Quote mark** (Rethink Sans Bold, 240pt, red, top-left): "
- **Hero quote** (Rethink Sans Bold, 84pt, near-black): "I write every post like it's a DM to one person. That's why the right one always replies."

## Slide 20 — One call to action

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "RULE 4 / 4"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "One ask."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, near-black): "Repeated quietly."
- **Third line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, red): "For one year."

## Slide 21 — What a great CTA sounds like

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Two-card comparison.
- **Card 1** (left, 2px near-black border, 0 radius, white fill, 48px padding):
  - Eyebrow (silver): "OFF"
  - Body (Inter 32pt near-black): "DM me to learn more."
- **Card 2** (right, 2px red border, red eyebrow):
  - Eyebrow (red): "ON"
  - Body (Inter 32pt near-black): "Comment OPTIMIZER and I'll send you the tool."

## Slide 22 — Why the four ones work

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas.
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Repetition is not boring."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, red): "Repetition is recognition."
- **Caption** (Inter 32pt silver): "Same person. Same platform. Same audience. Same ask. For one year."

## Slide 23 — Monday morning version

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Bold stat.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE"
- **Hero stat** (Rethink Sans Bold, 200pt, near-black): "2 hrs / week."
- **Sub** (Rethink Sans Semibold 48pt, near-black): "From your phone. No team. No agency."

## Slide 24 — The cadence

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Three days highlighted.
- **Title** (Rethink Sans Semibold 72pt, near-black): "Three posts a week. Same window."
- **Calendar row** (seven day boxes, 2px near-black border, 0 radius):
  - Mon (gray fill, silver text)
  - Tue (red fill, off-white text "POST")
  - Wed (red fill, off-white text "POST")
  - Thu (red fill, off-white text "POST")
  - Fri (gray fill, silver text)
  - Sat (gray fill, silver text)
  - Sun (gray fill, silver text)

## Slide 25 — The content stack

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas. Three vertical cards.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "FOREVER STACK"
- **Three cards** (2px near-black border, 0 radius, white fill, equal width, 48px padding):
  - Card 1 — Eyebrow "TUE", Title "Story" (Rethink Sans Bold 64pt), Body (Inter 28pt) "One thing that happened to you this week."
  - Card 2 — Eyebrow "WED", Title "Lesson", Body "One sharp thing you learned doing your work."
  - Card 3 — Eyebrow "THU", Title "Asset", Body "One thing you can give away for free."

## Slide 26 — The gift

- **Layout.** Off-white canvas.
- **Eyebrow** (red): "FROM ME TO YOU"
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, near-black): "Your LinkedIn profile is the storefront."
- **Second line** (Rethink Sans Bold, 96pt, red): "Most of you left the door locked."

## Slide 27 — The URL

- **Layout.** Near-black inverse canvas. URL + QR.
- **Eyebrow top** (Rethink Sans Bold, 36pt, uppercase, red): "$1,000 LINKEDIN PROFILE AUDIT"
- **URL** (Rethink Sans Bold, 120pt, off-white, centered): "linkedinprofile.purelypersonal.ai"
- **Sub** (Inter 32pt silver): "Free. Forever."
- **QR code** (bottom-right, 320×320px, near-black foreground on off-white panel). Generate from this URL: `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=320x320&color=0a0a0a&bgcolor=f7f7f8&data=https%3A%2F%2Flinkedinprofile.purelypersonal.ai%2F`
- **Caption next to QR** (Inter 28pt off-white): "Scan. Or open it on your phone now."

## Slide 28 — Last frame

- **Layout.** Near-black inverse canvas. Closing line.
- **Hero** (Rethink Sans Bold, 110pt, off-white, centered): "The brand walks in the room before you do."
- **Sub** (Inter 36pt silver): "Start building yours tonight."
- **Bottom-center small** (Inter 24pt off-white at 60%): "Daniel Paul · danielpaul.ai"

## Brand asset references for the designer

- Headshot: `GBI-Singapore-2026/danny-nobg.png` (transparent) or `GBI-Singapore-2026/danny.png`
- Brand tokens: `GBI-Singapore-2026/design-system-reference/tokens.json`
- Brand CSS: `GBI-Singapore-2026/design-system-reference/colors_and_type.css`
- Voice DNA: `GBI-Singapore-2026/design-system-reference/voice-dna.md`

## Canva setup checklist

1. Create a new 1920×1080 presentation.
2. Set brand kit colors: `#0a0a0a`, `#e90d41`, `#f7f7f8`, `#b8bec1`, `#ffffff`.
3. Set brand kit fonts: Rethink Sans (heading), Inter (body). Both free on Google Fonts; Canva has Rethink Sans.
4. Set page background default to `#f7f7f8`.
5. Build slide 1 as a master (inverse canvas), duplicate for slides 8, 12, 27, 28.
6. Build slide 2 as a second master (off-white canvas), duplicate for the rest.
7. Apply 96px margins as guides.
8. No emojis. No drop shadows. No gradients. No 3D. No bevels.
